title: Gun rights groups see 'golden age' under Trump administration
description: New gun rules and lawsuits against states signal how this Trump administration is using its powers to align itself with the wishes of the gun rights movement.

title: 4 takeaways from Tuesday's primary night in half a dozen states
description: While Trump continues to rack up victories on his vengeance tour, general-election opponents are waiting in swing districts and swing states. Can frontline GOP candidates navigate these choppy waters?

title: Lawmakers grill FAA's Bryan Bedford on safety and air traffic controller shortage
description: FAA Administrator Bryan Bedford faces tough questions from lawmakers about the state of the nation's air traffic control system and its efforts to increase staffing.

title: Georgia Senate GOP primary heads to runoff where electability is a top issue
description: Georgia was among six states where voters participated in primaries Tuesday. Its Senate race is among a handful that could determine party control next year.

title: Pentagon says U.S. will cut thousands of troops from Europe
description: Poland was set to receive forces whose deployment was abruptly halted last week.

title: Kentucky Republican Rep. Thomas Massie loses primary race to Trump-backed challenger
description: A Kentucky primary has resulted in Rep. Thomas Massie being unseated by GOP primary candidate Ed Gallrein. Massie clashed with President Trump, voting against his party.

title: Vance and Rubio step behind the lectern — and deeper into 2028 territory
description: Parallel briefings by the two men offer a view of their contrasting styles.

title: Trump endorses Paxton in Texas Senate primary over incumbent Cornyn
description: The president faced pressure from his base to endorse the state’s attorney general, Ken Paxton. Advisers had urged him to support Sen. John Cornyn, arguing that Paxton has too much baggage.

title: Admiral accuses lawmaker of ‘inappropriate’ remark at Iran war hearing
description: Adm. Brad Cooper, the head of U.S. Central Command, appeared frustrated with questions from House Democrats who pressed him on a range of issues about the conflict.

title: In Georgia, two GOP Trump backers vie to face former Atlanta mayor for governor
description: Georgia is a swing state where both Democrats and Republicans are deciding the direction their parties will take in the fall in races for the senate and the governor's mansion.

title: Trump’s extraordinary $1.8 billion legal fund to his allies
description: Why the enormous fund is so controversial.

title: U.S. government to drop tax claims against Trump in broadening of IRS settlement
description: As part of the settlement agreement, the U.S. is "forever barred and precluded" from examining or prosecuting President Trump, his sons and the Trump organization's current tax issues, according to a document posted to the DOJ website.

title: Endorsed by Trump, Ed Gallrein defeats Rep. Thomas Massie in GOP House primary
description: In a major victory for President Trump, his hand-picked challenger, Ed Gallrein, beat out U.S. House Rep. Thomas Massie in a Kentucky House GOP primary, ending Massie's reelection bid.

title: Trump shows off White House ballroom construction as funding stalls in Congress
description: The president offered journalists the closest look yet at the construction project, where photographers captured images of the work in progress and Trump touted security measures.

title: Tracking who Trump is appointing to fill key administration roles
description: Follow President Trump’s progress filling over 800 positions, among about 1,300 that require Senate confirmation, in this tracker from The Washington Post and the Partnership for Public Service.

title: Kentucky Rep. Thomas Massie fights for his political career without Trump's backing
description: A Kentucky primary will test whether Rep. Thomas Massie, who has clashed with President Trump, has enough support among GOP voters in his district. Trump is backing GOP primary candidate Ed Gallrein.

title: Democrats search for their policy agenda
description: A group of top Democrats from across the country met Tuesday to discuss the future of their agenda, beyond opposition to President Trump.

title: President Trump promised to house 6,000 homeless veterans in LA. His budget funds zero
description: One year after President Trump's executive order to build housing for thousands of homeless veterans in Los Angeles, advocates say little has been done.

title: The Republican senators speaking out against Trump
description: Sen. Bill Cassidy joins a short but notable list
